commands.review_summary:
The PR broadens sandbox Docker env config values to SecretInput/SecretRef, adds runtime collectors and registry/docs entries, and adds config, secrets, and sandbox merge tests.

PR surface: Source +182, Tests +175, Docs +16. Total +373 across 12 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding by source inspection: a config whose only SecretRef is under sandbox Docker env does not match the direct agent command detector or target set, so resolution can be skipped before normalization drops the structured value. The broader linked request is a feature rather than a failing current-main bug reproduction.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human follow-up is needed because the PR combines a concrete code defect with missing contributor real-behavior proof and a maintainer security-boundary decision.

target.title: [codex] feat(sandbox): support SecretRef docker env
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

`sandbox.docker.env` previously accepted only literal strings. Operators who needed API keys, database URLs, or other credentials inside Docker sandbox containers had to put plaintext into `openclaw.json` or rely on ad-hoc environment interpolation outside the SecretRef flow. That left sandbox env credential handling inconsistent with model providers, skills, gateway auth, and other config-backed credential surfaces.

## Summary

- allow `agents.defaults.sandbox.docker.env.*` and `agents.list[].sandbox.docker.env.*` values to be SecretInput strings or structured SecretRefs
- resolve active Docker sandbox env SecretRefs during runtime snapshot preparation while leaving inactive sandbox surfaces unresolved with diagnostics
- register the new sandbox env credential surfaces for secrets plan/configure/audit and refresh the SecretRef credential docs matrix

Fixes #38309

## Evidence

- `node scripts/test-projects.mjs src/config/config.sandbox-docker.test.ts src/secrets/runtime.test.ts src/secrets/target-registry.docs.test.ts` passed: 27 runtime-config tests and 9 secrets tests
- `node scripts/test-projects.mjs src/secrets/runtime.coverage.test.ts src/agents/sandbox-merge.test.ts src/agents/sandbox-create-args.test.ts` passed: 25 unit-fast tests and 73 secrets coverage tests
- `node scripts/test-projects.mjs src/agents/sandbox-merge.test.ts` passed after adding the empty-env compatibility regression test
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 ...` passed for touched files
- `pnpm exec oxlint ...` passed for touched TypeScript files
- `pnpm tsgo:core` passed
- `pnpm tsgo:core:test` passed
target.author: yu-xin-c
